mapper.select: SELECT fr.sgg_cd, fr.umd_nm, ( SELECT sd.deal_amount FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm ORDER BY sd.deal_date DESC, sd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_sale_price, ( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_jeonse_deposit, ( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent_deposit, ( SELECT rd.monthly_rent FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND sd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS sale_deal_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS jeonse_deal_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS monthly_rent_deal_count FROM favorite_region fr WHERE fr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC, fr.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_region (user_id, sgg_cd, umd_nm) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sggCd}, #{umdNm})
